name: northstar-collective-oracle
description: Original, air-gapped Northstar Collective corporate homepage oracle served on port 3000.

scripts.verify:build: node --check web/northstar.js && node --check web/webmcp.js && node --check server.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['web/index.html','web/northstar.css','web/assets/hero-poster.jpg','web/assets/hero-montage.webm','web/assets/northstar-annual-report-2025.pdf','web/assets/og-northstar.jpg'];const missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.existsSync(f)||!fs.statSync(f).size);if(missing.length){console.error('missing build assets:',missing);process.exit(1)}console.log('build ok')"
